## Problem

What limitation or gap are you encountering? Ex. "HaluGuard doesn't detect X" or "I need support for Y language."

## Proposed solution

What would you like HaluGuard to do differently?

## Alternatives

What workarounds have you considered?

## Additional context

Any links, references, or examples that would help.
